title: Dashbalar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dashbalar''' was a city on the planet of [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Dashbalar was a favored trading center of the native [[Qulun]] clan.

{{City-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
